---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the situation where today's RepoGarden falls short.

## What would you like to see?

The change you have in mind. Sketches, examples, or pseudocode welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit.

## Notes

Anything else worth knowing — links to similar tools, related issues, etc.
